programme.title: The Outrun
programme.desc: A young woman named Rona (Saoirse Ronan), who has recently left an addiction treatment center, returns from London to her native Scotland, to one of the islands of the Orkney archipelago.Because her parents are separated, she lives alternately with her mother, where she meets with her religious friends, and with her father, whom she helps on the farm.At the same time, she is still trying to cope with difficult memories - the beginning of her stay in London, where she started studying biology and often went to clubs with her boyfriend Daynin (Paapa Essiedu).She didn't even notice when she fell into alcoholism, which led to problems in her relationship and began to destroy her life.Meanwhile, while staying on the island, Rona decides to return to London.However, already on the ferry he feels that he is unable to control the urge to drink alcohol.He must re-plan his life.

programme.title: Critical Incident: A Death At The Border
programme.desc: Anastasio Hernández-Rojas died a few days after being detained by border authorities in 2010.Everything points to murder, but no one has been charged in this case.

programme.title: Summer School, 2001
programme.desc: Kien returns to Cheb in the Czech Republic, where his relatives run a stall at the market.His appearance changes the family's life.

programme.title: Wolfgang (extraordinari)
programme.desc: After the sudden death of his mother, nine-year-old Wolfgang (Jordi Catalán), an exceptionally gifted boy with features on the autism spectrum, is forced to live with his father, Carles (Miki Esparbé), whom he has never met before.An orderly nine-year-old who strives for perfection cannot stand his father's chaotic lifestyle.He wants to escape to Paris to study at the Grimald Academy and become the best pianist in the world.When Carles discovers his plan, he must make the most important decision in his life: follow his dream of an acting career or sacrifice his plans and become the father Wolfgang really needs.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Far From Home
programme.desc: The authorities of the Midtown School of Science and Technology are organizing a two-week expedition to the Old Continent.Tour participants visit, among others, Venice.The city is attacked by a powerful Water Elemental.Peter Parker tries to save his friends, but he is powerless against the creature.Fortunately, Mysterio comes to his aid and kills the creature.A mysterious savior once lived in an alternate reality.He convinces Parker to engage in the fight against the creatures that were supposed to destroy his civilization.The boy refuses because he wants to live the life of an ordinary teenager and find happiness with MJ.As a result of a trick involving Nick Fury, he changes his mind.He makes a disastrous decision when he gives Beck the glasses he inherited from his mentor Tony Stark, which enable him to take control of the artificial intelligence created by the millionaire.He must correct his mistake as soon as possible.

programme.title: Veep 3
programme.desc: In the third season, vice president Selina Meyer (Julia Louis-Dreyfus) tries for a promotion.To this end, he is trying to win over voters during the premiere of his new book 'Some New Beginnings'.

programme.title: Veep 3
programme.desc: In the third season, vice president Selina Meyer (Julia Louis-Dreyfus) tries for a promotion.To this end, he is trying to win over voters during the premiere of his new book 'Some New Beginnings'.

programme.title: Drazen
programme.desc: 1970s.Teenage Dražen Petrovic (Tonko Stosic) living in Šibenik discovers, thanks to his older brother, Aleksander (Lovre Tanfara), that he has a talent for playing basketball.At first, he trained only with him or alone - in the evenings in the gym.When his abilities are noticed at school, he joins the local team, Šibenka, where he is successful.During this time, he falls in love with Renata (Romina Tonkovic).Over time, a talented young man (Domagoj Nizic) goes to a club in Zagreb and then abroad, among others.to Real Madrid, and finally received an offer to play with the New York Brooklyn Nets team, part of the NBA league.Unfortunately, Dražen's passion for basketball also becomes his curse, and success is associated with problems in his personal life, also in his relationship with Renata.A biographical story about the outstanding Croatian athlete, called the Mozart of basketball, who was the first European to play in the NBA.

programme.title: The Night Before Christmas In Wonderland
programme.desc: One day, Santa Claus receives a letter from the Queen of Hearts.Together with his faithful team of reindeer, he sets off to Karina Czarów to deliver a gift for her.However, he quickly gets into serious trouble.

programme.title: Book of Dragons
programme.desc: Hiccup, Astrid, Fishlegs and Gobber learn the secrets of the dragons contained in the book.Gobber tells the others the story of Borek the Unlucky, who was the first to describe these unusual creatures.

programme.title: Soul On Fire
programme.desc: Nine-year-old John O'Leary suffers burns to almost his entire body.He struggles with pain and limitations.However, he wins love and makes his dreams come true.He inspires others by showing how to live life to the fullest.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn - Part 1
programme.desc: Bella Swan and Edward Cullen are getting married.They spend their honeymoon on a private island in Brazil belonging to the groom's family.Two weeks later, Bella discovers she is pregnant.The fetus is developing at a rapid pace.The couple returns to Forks.It turns out that Bella's condition means great danger to her.The werewolves, led by Sam, want to kill her unborn offspring, who may turn out to be a demon.Jacob defies his pack and decides to protect his lost loved one.The Cullen family prepares for a difficult birth.Edward will have to fight to save the person he loves with all his heart.

programme.title: French Courier from Liberty, Kansas Evening Sun
programme.desc: The 20th-century fictional French town of Ennui-sur-Blasé is the headquarters of "Kurier Francuski", a magazine published by American emigrants.When a respected editor, Kansas native Arthur Howitzer Jr (Bill Murray), dies, the entire team gathers to write an obituary.Their memories make up four colorful stories.Herbsaint Sazerac (Owen Wilson), an avid cyclist, recalls dark stories related to the city, showing its dangerous alleys.J.K.L.Berensen (Tilda Swinton) presents the story of an insane painter, Moses Rosenthaler (Benicio del Toro), who creates from behind prison bars.A brilliant artist is involved in an affair with a guard and his muse (Lea Seydoux).An art dealer, Julian Cadazio (Adrien Brody), tries to make money from his paintings.Lucinda Krementz (Frances McDormand) tells the story of a fiery student rebellion led by Zeffirelli (Timothée Chalamet).It is also a story of beautiful love and tragic death on the barricades.Roebuck Wright (Jeffrey Wright) presents a story about drugs, kidnappings and refined cuisine, and its hero will be Lieutenant Nescaffier (Steve Park).Another visual masterpiece from Wes Anderson is a tribute to old-style journalism.The elaborate, nostalgic anthology is inspired by the famous weekly "The New Yorker" and the personalities who made up its editorial staff.

programme.title: Caught Stealing
programme.desc: 1990s. Former baseball player Hank Thompson (Austin Butler) works as a bartender in a New York pub.He has a great girlfriend (Zoë Kravitz) and a championship-fighting team.His calm and orderly life changes when his neighbor Russ (Matt Smith) asks him to look after his cat for a few days.Then, out of nowhere, a gang of gangsters attacks Hank.Puerto Ricans, Russians and Jews are out to get him and he has no idea why.He will only find out what's going on if his wits and luck allow him to stay alive long enough.

programme.title: Heated Rivalry
programme.desc: Two ice hockey players, Shane Hollander (Hudson Williams) and Ilya Rozanov (Connor Storrie), are united not only by ambition and the need for competition, but also by a magnetic attraction that neither of them fully understands.What begins as a secret romance between two debutants turns into an extraordinary love journey.Athletes spend eight years chasing fame on the ice rink while trying to deal with their feelings off it.They must decide whether there is room for something as fragile as love in a world of brutal competition.

credits.actor: Man in the Crease Host #2 - Shaun Starr
Man in the Crease Host #1 - Conor McKenna

programme.title: House of the Dragon 2
programme.desc: The second series of the production, the events of which precede the action of "Game of Thrones".After the death of Lucerys Velaryon, the son of Queen Rhaenyra Targaryen (Emma D'Arcy), which was caused by his cousin, Aemond Targaryen (Ewan Mitchell), Westeros finds itself on the brink of a bloody civil war.The Green Council supporting King Aegon (Tom Glynn-Carney) and Queen Rhaenyra's Black Council are fighting for influence.Each side claims the Iron Throne.The dynamic development of events also affects the attitude of Rhaenyra's husband, Daemon (Matt Smith), in life.A man who spends a lot of time in Harrenhal Castle, away from his wife, changes a lot.In addition, the demons of his past begin to haunt him.

credits.actor: King Aegon II Targaryen - Tom Glynn-Carney
Lord Corlys 'The Sea Snake' Velaryon - Steve Toussaint

programme.title: Peacemaker 2
programme.desc: Two years have passed since the last events.Chris Smith (John Cena) considers himself a real hero.However, he must earn the recognition of other heroes.

programme.title: Kinds of Kindness
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated stories.Emma Stone, Jesse Plemons and Willem Dafoe play various roles.A corporate manager (Jesse Plemons) lives under the dictates of an eccentric boss (Willem Dafoe).She puts his well-being above her own and doesn't question any outlandish demands.Stripped of his dignity, he tries to free himself from total control.A policeman (Jesse Plemons) misses his wife (Emma Stone) - a biologist who disappeared during a research expedition.A woman who survived the disaster returns, but her marriage is put to the test.The husband becomes paranoid and is not sure if this is the same beloved he once married.The heroes of the last story are members of a sect who are looking for a person with the power to resurrect the dead.The work of Yórgos Lánthimos - the director of "Poor Things" which won four Oscars.For his performance, Jesse Plemons was awarded the Palme d'Or at Cannes.

programme.title: French Courier from Liberty, Kansas Evening Sun
programme.desc: The 20th-century fictional French town of Ennui-sur-Blasé is the headquarters of "Kurier Francuski", a magazine published by American emigrants.When a respected editor, Kansas native Arthur Howitzer Jr (Bill Murray), dies, the entire team gathers to write an obituary.Their memories make up four colorful stories.Herbsaint Sazerac (Owen Wilson), an avid cyclist, recalls dark stories related to the city, showing its dangerous alleys.J.K.L.Berensen (Tilda Swinton) presents the story of an insane painter, Moses Rosenthaler (Benicio del Toro), who creates from behind prison bars.A brilliant artist is involved in an affair with a guard and his muse (Lea Seydoux).An art dealer, Julian Cadazio (Adrien Brody), tries to make money from his paintings.Lucinda Krementz (Frances McDormand) tells the story of a fiery student rebellion led by Zeffirelli (Timothée Chalamet).It is also a story of beautiful love and tragic death on the barricades.Roebuck Wright (Jeffrey Wright) presents a story about drugs, kidnappings and refined cuisine, and its hero will be Lieutenant Nescaffier (Steve Park).Another visual masterpiece from Wes Anderson is a tribute to old-style journalism.The elaborate, nostalgic anthology is inspired by the famous weekly "The New Yorker" and the personalities who made up its editorial staff.

programme.title: The Night Before Christmas In Wonderland
programme.desc: One day, Santa Claus receives a letter from the Queen of Hearts.Together with his faithful team of reindeer, he sets off to Karina Czarów to deliver a gift for her.However, he quickly gets into serious trouble.

programme.title: Soul On Fire
programme.desc: Nine-year-old John O'Leary suffers burns to almost his entire body.He struggles with pain and limitations.However, he wins love and makes his dreams come true.He inspires others by showing how to live life to the fullest.

programme.title: Buffalo Kids
programme.desc: Tom and Mary arrive in New York to meet Uncle Niall.The relative who was supposed to pick them up doesn't show up at the port.The children, hiding in the train, set off on a journey through the Wild West.

programme.title: Red One
programme.desc: The third joint film of Jake Kasdan and Dwayne Johnson, after two installments of the new version of "Jumanji".The head of North Pole security and a bounty hunter search for the missing Santa Claus.

programme.title: Veep 3
programme.desc: In the third season, vice president Selina Meyer (Julia Louis-Dreyfus) tries for a promotion.To this end, he is trying to win over voters during the premiere of his new book 'Some New Beginnings'.

programme.title: Veep 3
programme.desc: In the third season, vice president Selina Meyer (Julia Louis-Dreyfus) tries for a promotion.To this end, he is trying to win over voters during the premiere of his new book 'Some New Beginnings'.

programme.title: Bambi: A Tale Of Life In The Woods
programme.desc: Bambi the deer runs away from hunters and gets lost in the forest.The terrified toddler is found by a majestic deer - his father.Gradually, Bambi must grow up and learn the art of survival.

programme.title: Goodbye, Christopher Robin
programme.desc: End of World War I.A.A.Milne (Domhnall Gleeson) moves to the countryside with his family and, finding inspiration in the toys of his son Christopher Robin (Will Tilston), creates a story about the adventures of Winnie the Pooh, who will soon become a children's favorite.However, the quickly achieved international success is not only about profits.The price of A.A.'s fameMilne will suffer not only himself, but also his wife Daphne (Margot Robbie), their son and his caregiver Olive (Kelly Macdonald).The moving film with biographical elements received a BIFA nomination for best supporting actress - Kelly Macdonald.The music composed by Carter Burwell was appreciated by the World Academy of Film Music.

credits.actor: Christopher Robin Aged 6 Months - Stanley Hamlin

programme.title: Kina \u0026 Yuk
programme.desc: Arctic.Two friendly foxes, Kina and Yuk, get into trouble.While playing, the second animal floats away on an ice floe into the unknown.Kina decides to do everything to find her companion.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn - Part 2
programme.desc: Bella and Edward are already married.However, the young couple did not have time to enjoy each other.The girl quickly became pregnant, but it turned out that it was life-threatening.Edward couldn't watch his beloved suffer and made the dramatic decision to transform her into a vampire.This was the only way he could save Bella from dying during the grueling labor.After the metamorphosis, the young woman improves her skills and learns to control her hunger.Together with her husband, she enjoys watching the rapid development of her extraordinary daughter, Renesmee, who at the age of three months looks like a two-year-old and can show her thoughts through images.The family idyll does not last long.There is a suspicion that the girl is an immortal child whose existence is against the law established by the Volturi.Renesmee and her parents are at risk of death.Edward and his family decide to defend themselves.They summon vampires from all corners of the world and prepare to confront the Volturi.

programme.title: Open Season
programme.desc: The friendly bear Boguś, raised by humans, leads an idyllic life in the park, where he is a tourist attraction.One day, the teddy bear meets a one-horned deer, the mischievous Elliot, who is persuaded to go on a trip together and gets into trouble.Boguś's guardian decides that it is time for the bear to live in a natural environment.The animal cannot cope outside civilization at all.He can't find his way home either.Moreover, the hunting season is just starting.Carefree Elliot and his helpless companion are now in real danger.Together, they convince the forest inhabitants to join forces and oppose the armed newcomers.

programme.title: Birdman: Or (The Unexpected Virtue of Ignorance)
programme.desc: Riggan Thomson (Michael Keaton) once gained fame as the main actor in a series of films about the adventures of a superhero called Birdman.Currently, the aging Riggan is working on a play that he intends to put on Broadway.He is both its director and the main actor.During rehearsal, one of the actors has an accident.The injured party's successor, Mike (Edward Norton), does not want to submit to the director's vision.Riggan's lover, Laura (Andrea Riseborough), tells him that she is pregnant with his child.His daughter Sam (Emma Stone), a recovered drug addict, also requires support.Soon the actor's dark alter ego begins to reveal itself.The film received four Oscars, including:as the best film.
